title: OKR use case: looking to share tips and experiences
excerpt: Just started to use Monday.com to monitor our company OKRs. Looking to share any tips and experiences from other users in terms of challenges, useful views for reporting, etc.

posts.author: SamP (SAMINDA PATHMASIRI)
